title: Replace supervision clock stub with monotonic temporal kernel and restart-budget proof harness

verification_steps.name: rch_package_check_frankenengine_node
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_bd18sp_check cargo check -p frankenengine-node --lib --tests --message-format short
verification_steps.detail: Blocked by unrelated upstream dependency errors in franken_engine/src/ts_module_resolution.rs (`lookup_exact_slot` missing).

verification_steps.name: rch_harness_unit_tests
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_bd18sp_harness cargo test --manifest-path artifacts/replacement_gap/bd-18sp/supervision_kernel_harness/Cargo.toml supervision::tests:: --lib -- --nocapture
verification_steps.detail: 29 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored. Compiles and tests the touched supervision module directly through the harness path include.

verification_steps.name: rch_harness_public_api_tests
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_bd18sp_harness cargo test --manifest-path artifacts/replacement_gap/bd-18sp/supervision_kernel_harness/Cargo.toml --test public_api -- --nocapture
verification_steps.detail: 2 passed, 0 failed. External-crate coverage confirms deterministic elapsed-time expiry and structured health report emission.

verification_steps.name: rch_harness_clippy
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_bd18sp_harness_clippy3 cargo clippy --manifest-path artifacts/replacement_gap/bd-18sp/supervision_kernel_harness/Cargo.toml --tests -- -D warnings
verification_steps.detail: Harness and embedded supervision module passed clippy with -D warnings after boxing the large counterexample error payload.

verification_steps.name: rch_hyperfine_kernel_comparison
verification_steps.detail: Same-worker hyperfine shows the monotone-queue kernel at 0.1161179768s mean versus 0.1569021394s for the retained Vec reference (1.35x faster).

acceptance_coverage: Real monotonic time remains sourced from MonotonicClock implementations (steady + deterministic), and a source-level checker rejects synthetic time stubs returning.
Restart-budget bookkeeping now prunes expired timestamps from the monotone front and computes health without allocating a filtered restart vector.
A reference-kernel proof harness performs exhaustive/minimal counterexample search over adversarial burst schedules.
Structured health logging is now explicit through record_health_report(), which emits SUP-008 events without changing existing APIs.
Equivalent public-API coverage exists both in the repository integration test file and in the isolated harness integration test.
notes: The repository-level integration test file was added at crates/franken-node/tests/supervision_temporal_kernel.rs, but package-level cargo verification is currently blocked by unrelated franken_engine compilation failures.
The harness exists only to verify the touched supervision module in isolation; it path-includes the real source file rather than compiling a copy.
Hyperfine output was exported to JSON for machine-readable evidence and reproduced from a checked-in artifact script.
